message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across connectors and crates

Automated rustfmt pass normalizing line wrapping, method chain
formatting, vec! macro layout, and struct literal alignment across
the entire codebase. No semantic changes — purely cosmetic formatting
to maintain consistent style after recent feature additions.

Affected areas:
- connectors: airtable, box, docusign, dropbox, evernote, postgresql, redis
- crates: fcp-audit, fcp-bootstrap, fcp-cbor, fcp-cli, fcp-conformance,
  fcp-core, fcp-e2e, fcp-graphql, fcp-host, fcp-manifest, fcp-oauth,
  fcp-sandbox, fcp-sdk, fcp-tailscale, fcp-testkit, fcp-webhook

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
